title: Story schema: id, description, status (draft|set), type (open string)
description: A story holds id, a one-sentence description, status draft|set, and a type. type is a free-form string (not an enum) so values such as user or llm-user are admitted without a schema change. title and acceptance_criteria are not present; stories carry no criteria.

evidence.reference: declares title, description, acceptance_criteria, and status enum proposed/ready/in-progress/in-review/complete/blocked

impact: Story schema carries criteria and a multi-state lifecycle; the model treats a story as a theme with no done-ness of its own.
proposed_resolution: Set story fields to id + description + status(draft|set) + type, where type is a free-form string (not an enum) admitting values like user or llm-user; drop title, acceptance_criteria, and the surplus status values proposed/ready/in-progress/in-review/complete/blocked.
